And I didn't really screen anybody who was there and the deal was everybody brings their stuff and everybody shows their stuff And we all workshop it, you know together and Ross Jefferies is registered and But there's also this so there's one woman in a crowd I don't I think we had 15 people to seminar there's one woman and she's like a little lady type woman and She's like so I forget what she's doing. It is what I call an unintentional sales training book It wasn't written for that purpose But if you read it for that purpose In addition to it being a good read unlike laws where you got a wade in addition to it being a good read It's a great sales training book. That's okay. Well quick pitch for those of you that don't Jerry is Well Jerry's deceased for one thing, but Jerry's one of the the sources I found real early and Jerry was doing a lot of what I've done and what we've done with the inner circle business Really before anybody now he never really understood how to turn it into big money But he had all the mechanics right And so if you study Jerry stuff You immediately see you'll see what I stole because it's blatantly obvious But I sort of learned the personality marketing thing. He's one of the ones I studied I learned the inner circle thing. He's one of the ones I studied I learned how to do a newsletter that worked and helped people's interest by studying Jerry And it's really regrettable that he didn't know a few things that would have turned it into big money But it is an enormously good resource. I forget the I wanted to write the years down. So this is What I got for is all of his newsletters for four years from 1992 to 1996 Which arguably probably was his heyday Although he dates back earlier than that And he advertised on the opportunity magazines some of the business magazines and the writers magazines is where his leads came from And he had a thing called towers club for writers His his original pitch sold a nine dollar book the writers utopia formula how to make $500 a day I think writing and never being published by a publishing house Jerry actually started the information business selling a little book about how to get gophers out of your gardens and Would classified ads And then he developed from writers. He really was teaching information marketing before anybody was calling it information marketing And then had a second inner circle club about that and a second newsletter about that So all of his newsletters what's in that resource or all of his newsletters from 92 to 96
